notes: UAE region appears to mirror global catalog; technical sheets use *_uae.pdf naming for localisation.

Some products in the focus list are not found on ar-ae region: eFlex Pedestrian Barrier (non-3-rail), Bollard Bumper (en-us only), Column Guard Spacer, Hydraulic Swing Gate (iFlex Swing Gates are hydraulic self-closing - captured as iFlex Swing Gate Short/Long), Slider Base Plates (captured as Slider Plate).
Monoplex 130 & 190 are sold as standalone products (Bollard 130 and Bollard 190) - the Monoplex Bollard page acts as an overview.
RackEye IoT sensor product page explicitly states not available in Middle East region.

Cold Storage variants (CS iFlex Pedestrian 3 Rail, CS iFlex Single Traffic+, CS iFlex Single Traffic, CS RackGuard, CS ForkGuard, CS iFlex Bollard, CS iFlex Height Restrictor, CS RackEnd Barrier) all captured.
Topple Barrier published heights are 3600mm and 5300mm; 2.08m (2080mm) variant may be a pre-2024 naming - no explicit 2.08m found but base Topple Barrier covers that range.

products.description: Designed to segregate and safeguard pedestrians from moving vehicles and workplace hazards. Suitable for both indoor and outdoor use. Ideal for facilities with lightweight vehicles or shallow angle impact risks. Flexible, energy-absorbing barriers visually define traffic routes while physically protecting pedestrians and drivers through impact cushioning and deflection.
features: Available in yellow, black or grey

products.rawText: iFlex Pedestrian 3 Rail. Designed to segregate and safeguard pedestrians from moving vehicles and workplace hazards. 100mm Ø Rails. Impact Zone 450-1100mm. Patented Coupling Technology. PAS 13 tested by TÜV Nord - 5,800 Joules at 2.3 tonnes / 8 kph / 90°,45°,22.5°. Suitable for lightweight counterbalance forklift, horizontal order picker, electric pedestrian truck, manual pallet truck, electric pedestrian stacker, pedestrians.

products.description: The 130-T0-P3 pedestrian barrier segregates and safeguards pedestrians from moving vehicles and workplace hazards. Its compact, energy-dissipating design makes it ideal for defining pedestrian routes in areas with light vehicle traffic or where shallow-angle impacts may occur. features: Manufactured from high performance recycled rubber

products.description: Rubber parking stops designed for low-set vehicles like cars and delivery trucks, ideal for car parks and facilities with busy foot traffic.

products.description: Access control solution designed for temporary or semi-permanent boundary creation between A-SAFE barriers, walls, or combinations thereof in dynamic industrial areas. Up to 9m of tape webbing.
features: Up to 9m (29.5ft) of high quality tape webbing
Multiple units linkable for extended coverage

products.description: Mobile safety management solution enabling teams to quickly cordon off racking aisles or work zones during maintenance or temporary closures. Supplied in portable carry case.
features: Strong magnetic attachments for tool-free installation
Designed to be carried by one person
Up to 9m of high tensile webbing
Includes 2 tape units, 2 attachments, 2 receivers, 8 magnets
products.rawText: Retractable Barrier Racking Kit - portable kit, 2 tape units + 2 attachments + 2 receivers + 8 magnets in carry case.

products.description: Mounting system designed for zones requiring barrier length maintenance with infrequent access. Allows barriers to slide out of position rather than being fixed, enabling fast access to maximize productivity.
